title: Amtech T1151 Keyless Combination Locking Bolt
features: DURABLE: This keyless combination locking bolt has a zinc alloy body with a durable polyester finish and a weather resistant chrome plated bolt
4-DIGIT COMBINATION: It features a secure 4-digit combination for added security
EASY TO INSTALL: The lock is easy to install with the anti-tamper screws provided
VERSATILE: It is ideal for both indoor or outdoor applications such as gates, sheds, windows and doors
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: This keyless combination locking bolt has a zinc alloy body with a durable polyester finish and a weather resistant chrome plated bolt. It also features a secure 4-digit combination for added security. Easy to install with the anti-tamper screws provided, it is ideal for both indoor or outdoor applications such as gates, sheds, windows and doors.
